results.title: Qualia Mind: Advanced Nootropic for Focus & Brain Health
results.content:
+

Qualia Life Sciences applies complex systems science to its approach. A key aspect of this model is adaptation—living organisms are highly skilled at adjusting to their surroundings. With this in mind, Qualia's formulations are intended to be taken for five consecutive days, followed by a two-day break each week. This schedule helps optimize the effects while preventing the body from becoming desensitized. The days off can be consecutive or spread out, as long as the break occurs weekly.

What are the most potent nootropics?

+

results.title: Guide to Starting and Stacking Qualia Supplements
results.content:
## Why Qualia Supplements Work Well Together

Qualia's system-based design means:

 Products don’t duplicate ingredients unnecessarily
 Pathways of support complement each other
 You can safely combine formulas for targeted goals
 Dosing schedules aim for simplicity (several products are taken just a few days a month)

This allows every product to do its job while contributing to a broader wellness strategy.

## Newer Options: Qualia Creatine+ & Qualia Magnesium+

Not all Qualia products require long ingredient lists. Qualia has begun creating products to support the most vital compounds for human health, such as magnesium and creatine, but even these simpler formulas are designed in the most premium and holistic way possible. [...] supplement space, is the way Qualia’s pioneering formulas are designed for many components carefully crafted together for a coordinated outcome. [...] Magnesium is often considered the most vital mineral for human health. It helps support heart health, immune health, bone, muscle, sleep quality, and healthy aging. 50% of us have low magnesium levels due to soil depletion causing less of it in our food, modern stress, and weak absorption of magnesium as we age. Yet many of us supplement with just one form of magnesium, and often forms that aren’t even very bioavailable.

Qualia Magnesium+ combines 10 forms of highly bioavailable magnesium plus 70 essential minerals, for the most comprehensive magnesium formula ever developed.

And Qualia has many more products in the pipeline, expanding to support a widening array of health needs through its uniquely holistic formulation methodology.

Top Scientists & MD’s

+

Top scientists in complex-systems modeling, neurobiology, organic chemistry, PhD and MD advisors contribute to Qualia product ideation, formulation and testing.

Research Backed Premium Ingredients

+

Qualia ingredients are chosen based on the strong empirical basis for their role in the formulation and their known safety.

Purity & Potency

+

We take great care to use potent, high-purity, and bioavailable forms of each ingredient that are ethically sourced, gluten-free and non-GMO.

Full Transparency

+

We are 100% transparent, publishing the ingredients, dosages, and formula rationale, in each of our products.

Meaningful Dosages

+ [...] Sara Adães, Ph.D.

Senior Research Scientist

Biochemist with a focus on neuropharmacology, published researcher in neuroscience, contributing to Qualia Life Sciences for 10+ years.

Shawn Ramer, Ph.D.

Chief Science Officer

Bioorganic chemist with a Ph.D. from Harvard, R&D leader, and part of Qualia Life Sciences since 2016.

Sarah Blomquist, Ph.D.

Nutritional & Botanical Researcher

Specializes in nutritional and botanical research, with a background in neuroscience and molecular biology at Qualia Life Sciences.

Colin Gardner, Ph.D.

Research Associate

Specializes in neuroscience and supplement research, with a background in clinical studies and scientific communication at Qualia Life Sciences.

Dan Pardi, Ph.D.
